---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve MiniMate
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📱 Environment
- **Device:** [e.g., iPhone 12, Samsung Galaxy S21]
- **OS:** [e.g., iOS 16, Android 13]
- **MiniPay Version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Browser:** [e.g., MiniPay in-app browser, Chrome]

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (transaction hash, error message, etc.).
